title: DynaMER-ADF: Leakage-Safe Modality-Adaptive Temporal Fusion for Multimodal Physiological Emotion Recognition

creators.name: Rehman, Abdul
creators.affiliation: Research Institute of Engineering & Technology, Jeonju University, Jeonju 55069, Republic of Korea

creators.name: Mun, Sungchul
creators.affiliation: Research Institute of Engineering & Technology, Department of Industrial Engineering, and Department of Data Engineering, Jeonju University, Jeonju 55069, Republic of Korea

description: DynaMER-ADF is a leakage-safe and modality-adaptive temporal fusion software package for multimodal physiological emotion recognition using EEG, eye-movement, ECG, and GSR/EDA signals. This release provides reproducibility code, configuration files, split-generation scripts, temporal feature preparation workflows, baseline training scripts, DynaMER-family training scripts, controlled ablation workflows, protocol-extension analysis, nested LOSO evaluation, physiological separability diagnostics, and result-generation utilities. Raw datasets, generated feature arrays, trained checkpoints, and private local path files are not included. Users must obtain the public datasets from their official sources and configure local paths using the provided templates. This is a software-only release; manuscript-linked citation metadata will be added after publication.
